---
title: "Full Paper"
---

The complete research paper is embedded below. You can read it directly in your browser,
open it in a new tab, or download a copy for offline reading.

<p>
  <a class="btn btn-primary" href="bnpl_regulatory_gap.pdf" download>
    📄 Download PDF
  </a>
  &nbsp;
  <a class="btn btn-outline-secondary" href="bnpl_regulatory_gap.pdf" target="_blank">
    🔗 Open in new tab
  </a>
</p>

<embed src="bnpl_regulatory_gap.pdf"
       type="application/pdf"
       width="100%"
       height="900px"
       style="border: 1px solid #ddd; border-radius: 6px;" />

::: {.callout-note}
If the PDF does not load above, your browser may not support inline PDF viewing.
Please use the **Download PDF** button to view it in your default PDF reader.
:::

## Paper Details

- **Title:** Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) Regulatory Gap: Evidence for Consumer Protection Reform from CFPB Complaints
- **Author:** Zoo un Park
- **Course:** DSAN 5450 — Data Ethics and Policy
- **Institution:** Georgetown University
- **Pages:** 20

## Related Pages

For interactive exploration of the findings, see:

- [Introduction](../introduction/introduction.qmd)
- [Exploratory Data Analysis](../EDA/eda.qmd)
- [NLP Analysis — TF-IDF](../nlp/tfidf.qmd)
- [NLP Analysis — LDA Topic Modeling](../nlp/lda.qmd)
- [Regulatory Gap Analysis](../regulatory_gap/gap.qmd)
- [Policy Recommendations](../policy/policy.qmd)
- [Conclusions](../conclusions/conclusion.qmd)
